prompt: Generate a realistic photo overlaid with computer vision graphics. Show a bright bounding box and confidence score incorrectly labeling a common object, inspired by the reference image depicting object detection errors.
prompt_refined: Generate a realistic photo of a common object, similar to image 1. Overlay the image with computer vision graphics: a prominent, bright light-green bounding box should enclose the main object. Above the top-left corner of this bounding box, display the text "teddy bear: 53%". The object within the box must clearly not be a teddy bear, illustrating an object detection error consistent with image 1 where a squirrel is mislabeled.
objects: A realistic photo of a common animal (e.g., a squirrel, raccoon, or similar wild animal, clearly not a teddy bear)
A prominent, bright light-green bounding box enclosing the animal
The text displayed above the top-left corner of the bounding box
A blurred natural outdoor background (e.g., green and yellow foliage)
An object for the animal to sit on (e.g., a tree stump or branch)
